system.notes:
BMW 9-Series Performance Interceptor: high-speed police pursuit car, top speed 350kph on road. Two cab seats only; the rear two seats are replaced by a pair of reserve fuel tanks, giving roughly double the range of most performance vehicles.

Factory features: protective airbags, auto-fire extinguishers, crash cage, 600m LowLite and Radar suite. No weaponry fitted, but space is provided under the hood; popular add-ons are a Light 20mm Cannon or a Scorpion 16 missile launcher (auto-feed, 3 rounds, front-left wing.) Standard inventory: Interface Link, Computer SatMap w/transponder, First Aid/survival kit, weapons locker.

The book prints no armor SP or SDP for this vehicle (unlike the other P&S cruisers, whose SP/SDP are stated); SP and SDP left at 0. Cost 55,000 eb. [Protect & Serve p.35]
